factionAbilities.name: ZEAL
factionAbilities.effect: You always vote first during the agenda phase. When you cast at least 1 vote, cast 1 additional vote for each player in the game including you.

factionAbilities.name: RAID FORMATION
factionAbilities.effect: When 1 or more of your units uses ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE, for each hit produced in excess of your opponent's Fighters, choose 1 of your opponent's ships that has SUSTAIN DAMAGE to become damaged.

versions.timing: When 1 or more of your units make a roll for a unit ability:
versions.effect: Choose 1 of those units to roll 1 additional die. Then, return this card to the Argent player.

factionTechnologies.name: Aerie Hololattice
factionTechnologies.effect: Other players cannot move ships through systems that contain your structures. Each planet that contains 1 or more of your structures gains the PRODUCTION 1 ability as if it were a unit.

abilities.name: Infantry Destruction
abilities.effect: When this unit uses ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE, each result of 9 or 10 also destroys 1 of your opponent's infantry in the space area of the active system.

abilities.name: Space Cannon Immunity
abilities.effect: Other players cannot use space cannon against your ships in this system.

mech.name: Aerie Sentinel
mech.deploy: This unit does not count against capacity if it is being transported or if it is in a space area with 1 or more of your ships that have capacity values.

synergy.description: Tus tecnologías azules pueden usarse como amarillas para prerrequisitos, y viceversa.

ability.name: Wing Transfer
ability.effect: When you activate a system that contains only your units, you may place command tokens from your reinforcements into any system adjacent to that system that contain only your units; at the end of this action, you may move ships among the active system and systems adjacent to it that contain your command tokens.

agent.name: Mirik Tillos
agent.ability: When a player produces ground forces in a system: You may exhaust this card; that player may place those units on any planets they control in that system and any adjacent systems.

commander.name: Commander Trillosa
commander.unlock: Have 6 units that have ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE, SPACE CANNON or BOMBARDMENT on the game board.
commander.ability: When 1 or more of your units make a roll for a unit ability: You may choose 1 of those units to roll 1 additional die.

hero.name: Helix Protocol
hero.ability: ACTION: Move any number of your ships from any systems to any number of other systems that contain 1 of your command tokens and no other players' ships. Then, purge this card.
